scripts.dev:web: bun run env:sync && bun run --cwd apps/web dev
scripts.dev:api: bun run env:sync && bun run --cwd apps/backend dev
scripts.dev:mobile: bun run env:sync && node scripts/patch-metro-exports.js && node scripts/mobile-dev.js
scripts.dev:nodb: bun run env:sync && bun run dev:web && bun run dev:api && bun run dev:mobile
scripts.db:push: bun --cwd apps/backend prisma db push --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate: bun --cwd apps/backend prisma migrate dev --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate:reset: bun --cwd apps/backend prisma migrate reset --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: bun --cwd apps/backend prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:reset: bun run db:down && bun run db:up && bun run db:migrate:deploy && bun run db:generate
scripts.build: bun run build:api && bun run build:web && bun run build:mobile
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd apps/web lint && bun run --cwd apps/backend lint
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd apps/web typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/backend typecheck && bun run typecheck:mobile
scripts.test: echo Run tests from app directories
